description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, angular roof and a mix of dark and medium brown exterior cladding. The front features a driveway with a parked car, a small porch, and a landscaped yard with geometric hedges and a pathway. The backyard includes a large tree, a swimming pool, a tent-like structure, and a small patio area, all set on a rectangular plot of green lawn. Windows are large and mostly rectangular, with a combination of single and grouped arrangements, providing ample natural light. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper floor set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat, angular roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a driveway, pool, and treehouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, porch, and geometric landscaping leading to the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard pool, tree, and tent structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, large tree, tent, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the full depth of the property with backyard features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single large windows
